svg.title: thermomind-continuity — What It Does
svg.desc: thermomind-continuity is a drop-in SDK that gives any LLM agent a persistent internal state across sessions
svg.text: thermomind-continuity — DROP-IN SDK — ANY LLM · ANY FRAMEWORK · ANY MODEL
🎮 Think of It Like a Game Genie.
A Game Genie doesn't replace your game. It supercharges it. thermomind-continuity doesn't replace your LLM.
It attaches to it — adding the persistent cognitive layer your model was never built to have on its own.
WHAT IT TRACKS ACROSS EVERY SESSION
WHAT YOUR LLM GETS BACK EVERY CALL
// guidance.hints — inject directly into your system prompt
// grade: A · stage: Generativity · runtime: 141+ days · identity: stable
One SDK. Any model. Any framework. Your agent starts becoming something.
Built on TCI · IBM Quantum Validated · MIT License · github.com/nile-green-ai/thermomind-continuity
